scores.materiality_reasoning: Wealth and property are foundational material assets.
scores.generality_reasoning: The right to inherit property is a central pillar of societal wealth distribution.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Inheritance provides a permanent transfer of material status.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Biological descent from a citizen is immutable.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: The text describes an actual legal occurrence in contemporary Athens.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: The mention of property left to a son is a statement of factual occurrence.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being a son does not inherently define the legal right to property inheritance.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Midwifery is a professional practice that provides a livelihood.
scores.generality_reasoning: A specific professional role within the health/religious sphere.
scores.persistence_reasoning: The role holds for the duration of the post-menopausal life stage.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Age and biological sex are immutable traits.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Socrates refers to a standard social practice in Athens.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Reported as a general custom ('you know, I suppose'), framed with some myth.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being a woman does not by definition mean one is a midwife.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Matchmaking is a social role with secondary material effects.
scores.generality_reasoning: A specific social interaction tied to a particular profession.
scores.persistence_reasoning: The avoidance persists for the duration of the professional career.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Midwifery is an acquired professional status.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Reflects social stigmas and practices in contemporary Athens.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Combines factual social avoidance with Socratic argumentation.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Avoiding matchmaking is not part of the definition of a midwife.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Cognitive preservation and soul habit are abstract/spiritual.
scores.generality_reasoning: Covers a broad aspect of human development and education.
scores.persistence_reasoning: The health of the soul is framed as a long-term developmental state.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Age (being a minor) is fixed at any given moment.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Reflects contemporary Greek pedagogical and psychological theories.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Presented as a philosophical argument rather than an attested social fact.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Cognitive health is not the definition of a minor.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Physical health and bodily habit are tangible, bodily entitlements.
scores.generality_reasoning: Covers the general maintenance of the human body.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Requires recurring effort; the 'habit' is lost through idleness.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Health status is episodic and changeable.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Reflects standard medical and social views in Plato's time.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Socrates cites this as a widely accepted medical/social principle.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Possessing a healthy body is not the definition of 'the healthy'.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Membership in a family determines physical care and survival.
scores.generality_reasoning: Foundational access to social and legal personhood.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Acceptance into the oikos is a lifelong status.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Being an infant is a biological age stage.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: The Amphidromia was a contemporary Athenian social ritual.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: The verbatim describes a well-attested social institution.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being an infant does not define being introduced to the hearth.

scores.materiality_reasoning: The resource is life itself (protection from exposure).
scores.generality_reasoning: Covers the fundamental right to exist and be reared.
scores.persistence_reasoning: The decision determines the entirety of the child's life/death.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Minor/infant status is birth-fixed.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Paternal exposure was a legal reality in contemporary Athens.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Reported as a factual social/legal power held by the father.
scores.tautology_reasoning: The definition of an infant does not include being exposed.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Exemption from strenuous physical labor carries material benefit.
scores.generality_reasoning: Specifically tied to the gymnasium/wrestling setting.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Applies for the duration of the old-age life stage.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Age is an immutable biological status.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Describes a social interaction in contemporary Athens.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: A personal plea for exemption accepted by an interlocutor.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Exemption from wrestling is not the definition of being elderly.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Honor and disgrace are abstract, symbolic resources.
scores.generality_reasoning: Recurring protection in intellectual and social contexts.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Attached specifically to the 'youth' phase of life.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Age/Minor status is birth-fixed.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Reflects Athenian social norms regarding age and public reputation.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: An argumentative assertion used to encourage Theaetetus.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Disgrace avoidance is not part of the definition of being young.

scores.materiality_reasoning: The power to define law and honor has direct material effects on property and life.
scores.generality_reasoning: Foundational access to political and legal power.
scores.persistence_reasoning: As long as the state exists, this collective right persists.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Citizenship is a structural legal status.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Discusses contemporary theories of the polis and the 'Protagorean' view.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: A highly rhetorical and philosophical claim about the nature of truth/law.
scores.tautology_reasoning: A state defining its own laws is essentially what a state is.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Philosophical 'seriousness' is an honorific/symbolic resource.
scores.generality_reasoning: Tied specifically to the practice of dialectic/philosophical inquiry.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Bounded to the life stage of minority (being 'boys').
scores.immutability_reasoning: Minor status is immutable.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Reflects contemporary Athenian intellectual norms.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Socrates is arguing for a certain protocol of dialogue.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Lack of dialectical seriousness is not the definition of a boy.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Establishing laws of justice and piety has direct material impacts.
scores.generality_reasoning: Covers the entire legal and moral framework of a society.
scores.persistence_reasoning: These categories define the permanent structure of the state.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Metic/Foreinger status is a structural birth-status.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Focuses on contemporary political philosophy regarding state autonomy.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Presented as a philosophical doctrine (Protagoras) rather than a simple fact.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Lacking the right to define justice is not the definition of a metic.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Success in court directly affects property, freedom, and life.
scores.generality_reasoning: Covers a broad category of legal and social effectiveness.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Framed as a long-term byproduct of training and lifestyle choices.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Being a philosopher is a durable social identity and occupation.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Describes the social tension between philosophers and litigants in Athens.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Highly rhetorical passage full of authorial framing and bias.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Legal incompetence is not part of the definition of a philosopher.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Time limits in court affect the ability to defend one's property and life.
scores.generality_reasoning: Specific to the legal institution and trial procedures.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Applies for the duration of a single legal proceeding.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Litigant status is episodic and bound to a specific trial.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Describes the factual operation of the Athenian water-clock (clepsydra).
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Reports factual legal procedures (clepsydra, affidavits) as observed.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being a litigant does not inherently define having a speech time limit.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Participation in assembly and senate yields direct political and economic power.
scores.generality_reasoning: Foundational access to the city's political and legal infrastructure.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Describes a lifelong detachment from societal governance.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Being a philosopher is an acquired occupational identity.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Plato describes the perceived lifestyle of his own subculture.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Socrates is painting a rhetorical 'ideal type' of the philosopher.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Political ignorance is not the definition of a philosopher.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Leisure (schole) is a material condition involving freedom from labor.
scores.generality_reasoning: A broad status that allows for diverse life activities.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Framed as a durable aspect of the philosopher's way of life.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Philosopher status is a chosen identity/occupation.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Reflects contemporary Athenian social divisions of leisure.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Describes a real social arrangement within a philosophical argument.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Leisure is not part of the literal definition of 'philosopher'.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Draping a cloak correctly is a symbolic/status marker.
scores.generality_reasoning: Limited to dress code and visual presentation.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Tied to the lifelong status of being a 'freeman'.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Free status is a structural birth/legal status.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Reflects specific Athenian dress codes and class signaling.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Reports a widely recognized social convention of the time.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Wearing a cloak correctly is not the definition of a free man.

scores.materiality_reasoning: The 'validity' of professional opinion affects care and livelihoods.
scores.generality_reasoning: Pertains to the social authority of expert knowledge.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Holds for the duration of the physician's professional career.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Physicians gain status through specialized training.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Reflects Greek views on expertise and professional status.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Used as a logical example within a Socratic argument.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Truth of opinion is not the definition of a physician.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Judgment of product quality (wine) has direct economic effects.
scores.generality_reasoning: Pertains to specialized authority in agriculture.
scores.persistence_reasoning: The status is tied to the long-term occupation of farming.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Occupation is acquired through labor and training.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Describes contemporary recognition of expert roles.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Presented as a logical consensus ('of course').
scores.tautology_reasoning: Knowing wine quality is not the definition of 'husbandman'.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Determining musical harmony is a role-based status.
scores.generality_reasoning: Limited to the domain of musical performance and theory.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Bound to the professional career of the musician.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Musicianship is a durable occupational identity.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Describes contemporary professional hierarchies.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: An example designed to gain assent in a dialectical process.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Judging harmony is not the literal definition of 'musician'.
